use_cases: Navigate through pages of data in tables or lists within SaaS dashboards
Browse product listings in e-commerce applications with multiple result pages
Paginate through log entries or search results in developer tools
Navigate content sections in media or documentation sites
Switch between pages of results in any data-driven application
ai_summary: A flexible, variant-driven pagination component built with class-variance-authority for theming flexibility. Supports multiple visual styles (default, outline, ghost), sizes (sm, default, lg), and variants (default, compact), with built-in accessibility via focus-visible rings and disabled states. Includes chevron navigation buttons and ellipsis support for navigating between page ranges.
